outcome_record.event_name: World Rowing Championships 2027 — Men's Eight Final

prediction.pre_match_note: World Rowing Championships 2027. Men's Eight. Crew event: 60% individual erg + 40% crew chemistry applied. Predicted winner: crew with most stable lineup (same 8 for 14 months). Opponent: 2 substitutions in last month — chemistry disrupted. SMS 71.

outcome.final_score: Stable-lineup crew won World Championship title

calibration_flags.notes: Crew event stability model validated. 14-month lineup stability correctly identified as decisive over opponent with 2 recent substitutions. 60/40 individual/crew split model confirmed for eight. World Championships level validates model at peak competition.
